title: CP2 Conditional Pre-Authorization Decision
preauthorization_scope: Collect voluntary role acceptance and verification evidence
Deploy and verify CP2 minimum environment controls
Prepare a separate CP2 activation decision
conditions_precedent: Slots A, B, and C staffed by three distinct real people
Scope, expiry, recusal, and replacement recorded
CP2 minimum environment controls deployed and verified
Operating context and jurisdiction review approved
Independent stop and incident routes tested
No real participant or case data
Main branch and document IDs re-audited
automatic_revocation: Main advances and creates an unresolved governance conflict
